title: TOOL PLUGINS
sub: Flowork ships hand-less. Fill its hands here: upload a tool-pack (.fwpack) to install, remove it to uninstall. Per-agent access is set under each Agent's Tools tab.
install_drop: Drop a .fwpack here — or click to choose a file
install_hint: A tool-pack is a .fwpack zip (plugin.json kind:tool + agent.wasm). It hot-loads instantly — no restart. Dangerous capabilities (exec/secret/shared-fs) are refused.
empty: No tool plugins installed yet. Upload a .fwpack above to fill Flowork's hands. (MCP tools are managed under Connections.)
uninstall_confirm: Uninstall tool '{tool}'? Agents will lose access to it.
